googleSheetsOAuth2Api.name: Google Sheets - Med Spa Lead Gen
Google Sheets - Med Spa Lead Gen

parameters.jsCode:
const now = new Date().toISOString();
return $('Consolidate Qualified Leads').all().map(item => ({
  json: {
    lead_id: item.json.lead_id,
    raw_result_key: item.json.lead_id,
    dedupe_key: item.json.dedupe_key || item.json.lead_id,
    pipeline_status: item.json.pipeline_status,
    status: item.json.pipeline_status,
    qualification_status: item.json.qualification_status,
    stage: 'enrichment',
    attempt_count: item.json.attempt_count,
    max_attempts: item.json.max_attempts,
    next_retry_at: item.json.next_retry_at,
    lease_owner: '',
    lease_until: '',
    last_checked_at: now,
    last_error_stage: item.json.last_error_stage,
    last_error_code: item.json.last_error_code,
    last_error: item.json.last_error,
    updated_at: now,
    schema_version: item.json.schema_version || 'v1',
  }
}));
